title: Item Despawn Timer
description:
ItemDespawnTimer is a lightweight PaperMC plugin that shows a real-time despawn countdown above dropped items.
It helps players recognize valuable and custom items, prevents accidental item loss, and reduces the need for ClearLag-style.
body:
# Item Despawn Timer (IDT)
Visual Drop Management | Glowing Items | 1.18 - 1.21 Support

## Overview
Stop items from vanishing silently! Item Despawn Timer (IDT) is a lightweight and highly optimized utility plugin that displays a live countdown timer above every dropped item on the ground.

Whether you run a Survival, PVP, or RPG server, IDT helps your players spot valuable loot instantly with glowing outlines and precise despawn countdowns. It also helps reduce server lag by ensuring items are removed efficiently when their time is up.

## **✨ Key Features**
- **Live Countdown:** Shows exactly how many seconds are left before an item disappears. Smart Item Counting: Automatically displays the stack amount (e.g., `x64`) in Green, only when the amount is greater than 1.
- **✨ Glowing Effect:** Configurable glowing outline (spectral effect) makes items easy to spot in the dark or from a distance.
- **Clean Formatting:** Uses a minimalist design: <Item Name> <xAmount> | <Time>s.
 - Example: Diamond Sword | 120s
 - Example: Oak Log x64 | 30s
- **⚙️ Fully Configurable:** Change the despawn time using seconds (s), minutes (m), hours (h), or even days (d). Version Guard: Built-in safety feature that automatically disables the plugin on unsupported server versions (below 1.18) to prevent errors.
Lag Free: Items are physically removed from the world when the timer hits 0, freeing up server RAM.
  
**Compatibility**
• Supported Versions: Minecraft 1.18, 1.19, 1.20, 1.21+
• Software: Spigot, Paper, Purpur.
• Java Requirement: Java 17 or newer.
